CustomField.description: True when this user is assigned to the FluentMetric_AI_Entitled_User permission set. Stamped nightly by FluentMetricEntitlementSyncSchedulable so the Tableau Next semantic model can compute adoption rate without joining PermissionSetAssignment (which Tableau Next can't project as a User-keyed dimension). The Apex EntitlementService still resolves entitlement from PSA at runtime; this boolean is a denormalized projection for analytics only.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Marks this user as part of the FluentMetric AI adoption-denominator scope. Stamped nightly from PermissionSetAssignment — do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: FluentMetric AI Entitled
